description: Schema for user-feedback regression fixtures. Store one case per test scenario under tests/fixtures/user-feedback/.

caseId.description: Unique identifier for the fixture case.

profile.description: Name of the target profile or preset used for the test.

expectedWatermark.description: Whether a watermark should still be detected after processing.

expectedMinConfidence.description: Minimum confidence score expected for the detection result.

expectedPosition.description: Expected watermark bounding box in image coordinates.

issueDescription.description: Short description of the user-reported issue or regression.

expectedResolution.description: Expected outcome after the fix or mitigation is applied.

example.issueDescription: Placeholder example for a reported watermark regression.
example.expectedResolution: Placeholder example: watermark should be removed or correctly detected according to the fixture type.
